symptoms: planner: fix the unstable test TestGCBindRecord
failure_signature: planner: fix the unstable test TestGCBindRecord
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: planner: fix the unstable test TestGCBindRecord.
